title: The live-action Moana trailer looks gray, lifeless, and nipple-free
author: Grant St. Clair
summary: Disney's 2016 animated feature Moana was, if nothing else, a stunningly gorgeous movie showing off one of the most beautiful parts of the world, all brought together by the most absurdly picturesque water I've ever seen in any medium. Disney had to invent a whole new CGI pipeline just to handle the water, and you can tell every second it's on screen (which is about 80% of the time). — <
